title: Israel, Lebanon discuss pilot scheme to hand over territory

snapshot.title: Israel, Lebanon discuss pilot scheme to hand over territory
snapshot.description: JERUSALEM/BEIRUT: Lebanon and Israel are discussing a US-backed proposal for Israeli forces to transfer some of the Lebanese territory ​invaded in their war with Hezbollah to Lebanon’s military, officials on both sides said. The proposed pilot project is part of the latest round of Israeli-Lebanese talks in Washington, which are going ahead even after they appear to have been
snapshot.author: Reuters
snapshot.pageTitle: Israel, Lebanon discuss pilot scheme to hand over territory | Arab News
